title: amygdalus divaricata
intro: Amygdalus divaricata, also known as the Chinese plum or wild apricot, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Amygdalus divaricata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Amygdalus divaricata include tea, decoctions, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the dried flowers, leaves, or bark in hot water.
